name: sing-box
note: GPL-3.0. Actively maintained Go reimplementation of the NaiveProxy server protocol with multi-user basic_auth support, built-in ACME, HTTP/3, and a clash-API for hot config reload. Replaces the unmaintained klzgrad/forwardproxy plugin in this stack. The wire protocol is identical to forwardproxy@naive, so existing naive clients connect unchanged. We bundle sing-box as a separate process (not statically linked) so its GPL-3 stays scoped to its own image; our proprietary code is unaffected.
